Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Guerrero Espinoza is present. Represented by Shon Garabaldi.
Attorney John P. Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lesvia A. Valdez is present.
Attorney Michael Spalding appearing for defendant in limited scope.
Spanish Court Interpreter Carla Cuevas is present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of February 6, 2017 is vacated. (501)
